Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Tranquil Panorama
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +56% (augmented)
Pack Size: +7% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +95% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Frostbitten" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 17(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Cold
{ Prefix Modifier "Profane" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 17(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Chaos
{ Prefix Modifier "Impacting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 90(90-100)% increased Stun Buildup
{ Suffix Modifier "of Drought" (Tier: 1) }
Players gain 33(35-30)% reduced Flask Charges
{ Suffix Modifier "of Fatigue" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 28(30-25)% less Cooldown Recovery Rate
{ Suffix Modifier "of Smothering" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 36(40-36)% less Recovery Rate of Life and Energy Shield
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
